product_info.company_description: A tech company focused on developing advanced robotic solutions for everyday tasks and companionship.
product_info.product_description: An innovative android that not only assists with household chores but also provides companionship and emotional support, designed to enhance your daily life.
product_info.target_audience: Tech-savvy individuals, busy professionals, and families looking for assistance in home management and companionship.
selling_points: Dual functionality as a chore assistant and companion
User-friendly interface and easy integration into smart homes
product_info.call_to_action: Experience the future of home living - Get your ChoreBot today!
product_info.additional_info: Available for pre-order with customizable features.

campaign_theme.slogan: Transform Your Home, Elevate Your Life.
campaign_theme.theme: A vibrant blend of technology and companionship, showcasing a futuristic lifestyle where ChoreBot seamlessly integrates into daily routines. The atmosphere captures a sense of urban excitement and the comfort of home.
campaign_theme.visual_style: The poster features a sleek ChoreBot illuminated against a rain-soaked cyberpunk cityscape, with neon lights reflecting off the asphalt. The video showcases dynamic angles of the ChoreBot in action, performing tasks while interacting warmly with family members, set to a pulsating electronic soundtrack.
campaign_theme.voiceover_script: Meet your new best friend and household hero. ChoreBot: where chores meet companionship. Experience the future of home living - Get your ChoreBot today!
